title: Spicy Kale Crumble
description: A quick and healthy snack featuring raw kale combined with spicy seasonings for a monsoon polish dish that's perfect for keto-friendly meals.

ingredients.name: 2 tablespoons olive oil
ingredients.notes: Can be substituted with avocado or macadamia nut oil for a keto-friendly option

ingredients.name: 1 teaspoon garlic powder
ingredients.notes: More to taste for added heat and flavor

instructions: Wash the kale leaves thoroughly and pat them dry. Tear the kale into bite-sized pieces.
In a mixing bowl, combine the olive oil, garlic powder, cumin, smoked paprika, salt, and pepper. Mix well until all ingredients are coated evenly with the mixture.
Add the torn kale to the mixing bowl and toss gently to ensure every piece is coated with the spice rub.
Transfer the mixed kale into a parchment-lined baking sheet. Spread it out in a single layer to allow even cooking.
Roast the kale for 15-20 minutes, shaking the tray once halfway through to prevent burning. The goal is to achieve crispy edges and slightly wilted center for the crumbly texture desired.
Once done, remove from heat and let cool enough so you can handle it without burning your hands before serving.
